title: origanum × font-queri
intro: Origanum × font-queri, also known as Spanish marjoram, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the mint family and is a cross between Origanum majorana and Thymus mastichina. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and its antiseptic and antibacterial properties, which can help to prevent the growth of certain microorganisms. The health benefits of Origanum × font-queri include its potential to alleviate digestive issues, such as bloating and gas, as well as its ability to reduce stress and anxiety levels. The plant can be prepared for herbal use through methods such as infusion, where the leaves are steeped in hot water to make a tea, or through the use of essential oils extracted from the plant.
